serverInfo.name: HappySprout Kids Learning
serverInfo.description: Bilingual educational video platform for children aged 3-12. Browse 59+ curated videos across 6 subjects, structured courses, practice exercises, and parental controls.

tools.name: search_videos
tools.description: Search the HappySprout video library by keyword. Returns matching educational videos with titles, channels, age groups, and categories.

tools.name: browse_by_age
tools.description: Filter all content by child age group: 3-5 years, 6-8 years, or 9-12 years.

tools.name: browse_by_category
tools.description: Browse videos by subject category: English ABC, Math, Science, Art, Music, or Stories.

tools.name: view_course
tools.description: View a structured course with learning objectives, video timeline, and guided practice exercises.

tools.name: submit_feedback
tools.description: Submit feedback, bug reports, feature requests, or content suggestions.

tools.name: get_course_list
tools.description: List all available structured courses with their names, descriptions, and target age groups.

resources.name: llms.txt
resources.description: LLM-friendly site overview with key pages and content structure

resources.name: robots.txt
resources.description: Crawler access rules for search engines and AI bots
